mapper.select: SELECT eo.*, g.name AS goods_name, g.description AS goods_description, g.image AS goods_image, v.username AS volunteer_name FROM exchange_order eo LEFT JOIN goods g ON eo.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON eo.volunteer_id = v.id ORDER BY eo.create_time DESC

SELECT eo.*, g.name AS goods_name, g.description AS goods_description, g.image AS goods_image, v.username AS volunteer_name FROM exchange_order eo LEFT JOIN goods g ON eo.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON eo.volunteer_id = v.id WHERE eo.id = #{id}

SELECT eo.*, g.name AS goods_name, g.description AS goods_description, g.image AS goods_image, v.username AS volunteer_name FROM exchange_order eo LEFT JOIN goods g ON eo.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON eo.volunteer_id = v.id WHERE eo.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY eo.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_order (volunteer_id, goods_id, quantity, total_points, status, address, contact_name, phone, order_number, tracking_number, create_time, refund_status, refund_reason, refund_evidence, refund_apply_time, refund_audit_time, refund_admin_id) VALUES (#{volunteerId}, #{goodsId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPoints}, #{status}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{phone}, #{orderNumber}, #{trackingNumber}, #{createdAt}, #{refundStatus}, #{refundReason}, #{refundEvidence}, #{refundApplyTime}, #{refundAuditTime}, #{refundAdminId})
mapper.update: UPDATE exchange_order SET volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}, goods_id = #{goodsId}, quantity = #{quantity}, total_points = #{totalPoints}, status = #{status}, address = #{address}, contact_name = #{contactName}, phone = #{phone}, order_number = #{orderNumber}, tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}, refund_status = #{refundStatus}, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_evidence = #{refundEvidence}, refund_apply_time = #{refundApplyTime}, refund_audit_time = #{refundAuditTime}, refund_admin_id = #{refundAdminId} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE exchange_order SET refund_status = #{refundStatus}, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_evidence = #{refundEvidence}, refund_apply_time = #{refundApplyTime}, refund_audit_time = #{refundAuditTime}, refund_admin_id = #{refundAdminId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exchange_order WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已完成' AND (refund_status IS NULL OR refund_status != '已通过')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exchange_order WHERE status = '已完成' AND (refund_status IS NULL OR refund_status != '已通过')
